svg.title: Full LLM round trip — request to GPU and response back
svg.desc: Horizontal flow: request travels right through CDN, private link, load balancer, API gateway, model router to GPU. GPU loops cache, attention, sampling per token. Response streams back left.
svg.text: The full round trip — request to GPU and back
Top = request going in · Middle = GPU processing · Bottom = response streaming back
② INSIDE THE GPU — loops once per token until the full answer is done
Cloudflare — TLS ends on the way in · re-encrypts on the way out · dashed arrow = private leased link to model company
Private network — load balancer · API gateway · model router
GPU — cache · attention · sampling · one token at a time · loops until done
